---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a maintainer workflow or parser improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Maintainer problem

What CI review or contributor handoff problem should this solve?

## Example failure

If possible, link to a public GitHub Actions run or paste a small sanitized log
excerpt.

## Desired output

What should `report.md`, `summary.md`, `repro.sh`, or `analysis.json` include?

## Notes

Mention any ecosystem details that matter, such as package manager, language,
runner image, matrix values, or GitHub Action setup step.
